title: Cyclophorus nummulariifolius
intro: Cyclophorus nummulariifolius, also known as Cyclophorus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. Bioactive constituents of Cyclophorus include flavonoids, saponins, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Cyclophorus is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, as well as being used in the production of extracts and tinctures.
taxonomy: Cyclophorus nummulariifolius is classified as a species of air plant, specifically belonging to the genus Cyclophorus within the family Bromeliaceae. This classification places it in the order Poales, which encompasses various families of flowering plants. The Bromeliaceae family includes over 3,000 species of air plants and tropical plants, commonly known as pineapple and orchids.
